heading: Woolpunda vs Woolshed Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woolpunda, South Australia and Woolshed Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Woolshed Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Woolpunda (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woolpunda or Woolshed Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woolpunda has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Woolshed Flat scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woolpunda scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Woolshed Flat scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woolpunda or Woolshed Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Woolshed Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
